item.title: It’s always concerning to underestimate the people you’re trying to undermine, but you also do need a real material analysis of ...
item.description:
It’s always concerning to underestimate the people you’re trying to undermine, but you also do need a real material analysis of their capacities and they are significantly limited by their actual population#greenscreenvideo



(Feed generated with FetchRSS)

item.title: It is not clear if these specific settlers were helped by the specific nonprofit or if they are simply interviewing them for the...
item.description:
It is not clear if these specific settlers were helped by the specific nonprofit or if they are simply interviewing them for their Instagram, what is clear is that they advertise helping people move to these settlements on their website. #greenscreenvideo



(Feed generated with FetchRSS)

item.title: Wow, you’re so cool
item.description:
Wow, you’re so cool. You really showed that international law whose boss, I hope everyone remembers this the next time you complain about people you don’t like violating international law#greenscreenvideo



(Feed generated with FetchRSS)

item.title: Call on the German police to stay consistent, and enforce their laws against hate groups like the SAVAK
item.description:
Call on the German police to stay consistent, and enforce their laws against hate groups like the SAVAK. And for the love of god, is someone calls for the bombing of their own country by the largest empire in the world, maybe they don’t love democracy Thanks @emmaysun for bringing this to my attention



(Feed generated with FetchRSS)

item.title: I think we often overly analyse and overly humanize the people that we are arguing with, and that can undermine our ability to a...
item.description:
I think we often overly analyse and overly humanize the people that we are arguing with, and that can undermine our ability to actually humanise them and know that they aren’t thinking that much#greenscreenvideo



(Feed generated with FetchRSS)
